{{Quote|…you shoulda' seen the results of our tests on Fest―my weapons are gonna put a lot of holes in a lot of Rebel scum―.|[[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Rebus (Galactic Empire)|Rebus]]|<ref name="DF">''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''</ref>}}
The '''Weapons Research Facility''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research and development center on the [[Water/Legends|ice]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Fest/Legends|Fest]]. It was guarded by a [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]] and a pair of [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile turrets]], as well as a number of outposts in the outlying vicinity. The facility was critical to the R&D of various [[Imperial Military/Legends|Imperial Military]] programs, including the [[Dark Trooper Project]], prior to its [[Escape from Fest|destruction]] by [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].

==History==
The Weapons Research Facility undertook projects that were overseen by a number of different [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]]. Moff [[Kohl Seerdon]] used the facility to construct [[All Terrain Personal Transport/Legends|AT-PTs]].<ref name="RS" /> As part of the [[Dark Trooper Project]], Moff [[Rebus (Galactic Empire)|Rebus]] had the facility process [[phrikite]] and [[Tydirium (ore)|tydirium]] into the super-strong alloy [[Phrik/Legends|phrik]]. This, he used to armor his [[Droid/Legends|droid]] designs. The facility also held an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]].<ref name="DF" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the facility was raided twice by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] following the revelation of its existence after mercenary [[Kyle Katarn]]'s capture of Rebus on [[Anoat/Legends|Anoat]].<ref name="DF" /> The Alliance had recently joined forces with the [[Atrivis Resistance Group/Legends|Atrivis Resistance Group]], providing them more access to the sector.<ref name="RASB">''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''</ref> In the first raid, operative Kyle Katarn [[Mission to Fest (Galactic Civil War)|infiltrated]] the facility and stole a sample of phrik.<ref name="DF" /> During the second mission, a team of [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Rebel commandos]] penetrated the complex and stole three AT-PTs, but their escape was compromised, requiring [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] to provide additional support. In the ensuing [[Escape from Fest|battle]], the facility, outposts, and [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile turrets]] were destroyed by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] following the destruction of its [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|deflector shield generator]].<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Weapons Research Facility appeared in two [[Star Wars video games|video game]]s: the [[1995]] first person shooter ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' and the [[1998]] flight combat game [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]. It was first depicted in the former as a phrik research facility and made its final appearance in the latter as an AT-PT factory which is destroyed in the game's eleventh mission.
